ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-26-2017 IN DEPT. 503, PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE IS GRANTED. THE FEBRUARY 27, 2017 TRIAL DATE, WITH A NEXT RETURN DATE OF JUNE 5, 2017, IS MAINTAINED WITH PREFERENCE STATUS PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A). LAST DAY PURSUANT TO CCP 36(F) IS AUGUST 24, 2017. ALL PRE-TRIAL DATES AND DEADLINES REMAIN DICTATED BY THE FEBRUARY 27, 2017 TRIAL DATE. THERE WILL BE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH PANG LY PURSUANT TO CRC, RULE 3.1380 AND SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULES OF COURT, RULES 5.0 AND 20.2 ON JUNE 5, 2017 AT 1:30P.M. IN ROOM 603. THE PARTIES SHALL COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES 5.0 AND 20.2 AND PROVIDE TO MS. LY A CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT STATEMENT AND CONFIDENTIAL SETTLEMENT DEMANDS STATING THEIR BEST AND FINAL OFFERS BY MAY 31, 2017 AT 2:00P.M. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA MING-MEI LEE, MATTER NOT REPORTED (503)

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Lorentzen Co., And Marine Engineering And Supply Company
Off Calendar Sep-21-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Janine M. Fiel-Cosse, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs Arlen and Janie Baker.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Lorentzen Co. or Marine Engineering and Supply Company.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Court grants Plaintiff's oral motion to dimiss Defendant Does 1-800. Plaintiff to file dismissal after hearing.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

With respect to defaulted defendant Lorentzen Co.:
To Plaintiff Arlen Baker for Economic Damages: $679,862.00
To Plaintiff Arlen Baker for Non-Economic Damages: $10,000,000.00
To Plaintiff Janie Baker for Loss of Consortium Damages $10,000,000.00
Total of Economic Damages and Non-Economic Damages: $20,679,862.00

With respect to defaulted defendant Marine Engineering and Supply Company:
To Plaintiff Arlen Baker for Economic Damages: $679,862.00
To Plaintiff Arlen Baker for Non-Economic Damages: $10,000,000.00
To Plaintiff Janie Baker for Loss of Consortium Damages $10,000,000.00
Total of Economic Damages and Non-Economic Damages: $20,679,862.00
For a total Judgment of $41,359,724.00.

Plaintiff to submit Judgment reflecting the Court's orders.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Maintaining The Current Trial Date With Preference
Off Calendar Apr-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Dustin M. Seesemann of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Arlen Baker and Janie Baker
Constance Fraenkel of SPANOS | PRZETAK (510-250-0200), Designated Defense Counsel

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER MAINTAINING THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE WITH PREFERENCE

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion for order maintaining the current trial date with preference is granted. The February 27, 2017 trial date, with a next return date of June 5, 2017, is maintained with preference status pursuant to C.C.P. 36(a). Last day pursuant to C.C.P. 36(f) is August 24, 2017. All pre-trial dates and deadlines remain dictated by the February 27, 2017 trial date. There will be a mandatory settlement conference with Pang Ly pursuant to CRC, Rule 3.1380 and San Francisco Local Rules of Court, Rules 5.0 and 20.2 on June 5, 2017 at 1:30p.m. in room 603. The parties shall comply with Local Rules 5.0 and 20.2 and provide to Ms. Ly a confidential settlement statement and confidential settlement demands stating their best and final offers by May 31, 2017 at 2:00p.m. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY ASBESTOS
